title: The structure of weak solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
The existence of superfluous solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations in the
whole space implies that not all solutions with uniformly locally bounded
energy satisfy a useful local pressure expansion. We prove that every weak
solution in a parabolic uniformly local $L^2$ class can be obtained as a
transgalilean transformation of a solution satisfying the local pressure
expansion in a distributional sense. This gives a powerful representation
theorem for a large class of solutions. We use this structure to obtain a
sufficient condition for the local pressure expansion.

AI.tldr: 证明了Navier-Stokes方程在抛物一致局部L^2类中的弱解可以通过transgalilean变换得到满足局部压力展开的解，建立了重要的表示定理。
AI.motivation: Navier-Stokes方程存在多余解，导致并非所有具有一致局部有界能量的解都满足有用的局部压力展开。需要研究如何通过变换将一大类解表示为满足局部压力展开的形式。
AI.techniques: 使用transgalilean变换技术，在分布意义下处理局部压力展开，建立抛物一致局部L^2空间中的表示定理。
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：抛物一致局部L^2类中的每个弱解都可以通过transgalilean变换得到满足分布意义下局部压力展开的解，这为一大类解提供了强大的表示定理。
AI.significance: 为Navier-Stokes方程解的结构提供了新的理解，建立了重要变换关系，可用于获得局部压力展开的充分条件，对研究方程解的正则性和唯一性问题有重要意义。

title: Differential Inclusions for Gradient and Symmetrized Gradient Operators
summary:
In this article, we study the necessary and sufficient conditions for the
existence of solutions in $W_0^{1,\infty}(\Omega;\mathbb R^n)$ in the minimal
dimension of $\textrm{span }E$ for the following problem: \begin{equation*}
P(D)u\in E \textrm{ a.e. in }\Omega, \end{equation*} where $P(D)= D$ or
$D+D^{\top}$, and $E\subseteq \mathbb R^{n\times n}$ is a given set. We
conclude this paper with some properties of real symmetric matrices.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了向量值偏微分方程解的存在性问题，确定了在最小维数条件下解存在的充要条件。
AI.motivation: 研究向量值偏微分方程 $P(D)u \in E$ 在 $W_0^{1,\infty}(\Omega;\mathbb R^n)$ 空间中解的存在性问题，其中 $P(D)$ 是微分算子（梯度或对称梯度），$E$ 是给定的矩阵集合，核心是确定解存在所需的最小维数条件。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、偏微分方程理论、矩阵分析和凸分析技术，特别是处理向量值Sobolev空间中的约束问题，以及实对称矩阵的性质分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了 $P(D)u \in E$ 在 $W_0^{1,\infty}(\Omega;\mathbb R^n)$ 中存在解的充要条件，确定了最小维数 $\textrm{span }E$ 的要求，并给出了实对称矩阵的相关性质。
AI.significance: 为向量值偏微分方程的约束问题提供了理论框架，在弹性理论、材料科学和几何测度论中有应用价值，特别是处理具有矩阵约束的变分问题。

title: Almost Periodic Solutions of The Cubic Defocusing Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation
summary:
This paper addresses the Cauchy problem for the cubic defocusing nonlinear
Schr\"odinger equation (NLS) with almost periodic initial data. We prove that
for small analytic quasiperiodic initial data satisfying Diophantine frequency
conditions, the Cauchy problem admits a solution that is almost periodic in
both space and time, and that this solution is unique among solutions locally
bounded in a suitable sense. The analysis combines direct and inverse spectral
theory.
  In the inverse spectral theory part, we prove existence, almost periodicity,
and uniqueness for solutions with initial data whose associated Dirac operator
has purely a.c.\ spectrum that is not too thin. This resolves novel challenges
presented by the NLS hierarchy, such as an additional degree of freedom and an
additional commuting flow.
  In the direct spectral theory part, for Dirac operators with small analytic
quasiperiodic potentials with Diophantine frequency conditions, we prove pure
a.c.\ spectrum, exponentially decaying spectral gaps, and spectral thickness
conditions (homogeneity and Craig-type conditions).

AI.tldr: 证明了三次散焦非线性薛定谔方程在小解析拟周期初值下的柯西问题存在时空拟周期解
AI.motivation: 研究非线性薛定谔方程在拟周期初值下的柯西问题，这类问题在数学物理中具有重要意义，特别是对于理解非线性波方程的长时间行为
AI.techniques: 结合直接谱理论和逆谱理论，利用Dirac算子谱分析、Diophantine频率条件、解析拟周期势等工具
AI.main_theorems: 1) 小解析拟周期初值下NLS存在时空拟周期解；2) Dirac算子谱的纯绝对连续谱、指数衰减谱隙和谱厚度条件
AI.significance: 为拟周期初值下非线性薛定谔方程的适定性提供了新结果，发展了处理NLS层次结构的新方法，对可积系统和谱理论有重要贡献

title: Existence and regularity of weak solutions for mixed local and nonlocal semilinear elliptic equations
summary:
We study the existence, multiplicity and regularity results of weak solutions
for the Dirichlet problem of a semi-linear elliptic equation driven by the
mixture of the usual Laplacian and fractional Laplacian
  \begin{equation*}
  \left\{%
  \begin{array}{ll}
  -\Delta u + (-\Delta)^{s} u+ a(x)\ u =f(x,u) & \hbox{in $\Omega$,}
  u=0 & \hbox{in $\mathbb{R}^n\backslash\Omega$}
  \end{array}%
  \right.
  \end{equation*}
  where $s \in (0,1)$, $\Omega \subset \mathbb{R}^{n}$ is a bounded domain, the
coefficient $a$ is a function of $x$ and the subcritical nonlinearity $f(x,u)$
has superlinear growth at zero and infinity.
  We show the existence of a non-trivial weak solution by Linking Theorem and
Mountain Pass Theorem respectively for $\lambda_{1} \leqslant 0$ and
$\lambda_{1} > 0$, where $\lambda_{1}$ denotes the first eigenvalue of $-\Delta
+ (-\Delta)^{s} +a(x)$.
  In particular, adding a symmetric condition to $f$, we obtain infinitely many
solutions via Fountain Theorem.
  Moreover, for the regularity part, we first prove the
$L^{\infty}$-boundedness of weak solutions and then establish up to $C^{2,
\alpha}$-regularity up to boundary.

AI.tldr: 研究混合拉普拉斯算子的半线性椭圆方程弱解的存在性、多重性和正则性
AI.motivation: 研究由通常拉普拉斯算子和分数阶拉普拉斯算子混合驱动的半线性椭圆方程Dirichlet问题，这类算子结合了局部和非局部效应，在数学物理中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法：Linking定理、山路定理、喷泉定理；正则性分析：先证明L∞有界性，再建立C²,α正则性
AI.main_theorems: 1) 当λ₁≤0时用Linking定理证明非平凡弱解存在；2) 当λ₁>0时用山路定理证明非平凡弱解存在；3) 在对称条件下用喷泉定理证明无穷多解；4) 证明弱解的L∞有界性和C²,α正则性
AI.significance: 为混合算子椭圆方程提供了系统的存在性、多重性和正则性理论，结合了局部和非局部算子的分析方法，对理解这类混合算子的性质有重要意义

title: Global Well-posedness for the periodic fractional cubic NLS in 1D
summary:
We consider the defocusing periodic fractional nonlinear Schr\"odinger
equation
  $$ i \partial_t u +\left(-\Delta\right)^{\alpha}u=-\lvert u \rvert ^2 u, $$
where $\frac{1}{2}< \alpha < 1$ and the operator $(-\Delta)^\alpha$ is the
fractional Laplacian with symbol $\lvert k \rvert ^{2\alpha}$. We establish
global well-posedness in $H^s(\mathbb{T})$ for $s\geq \frac{1-\alpha}{2}$ and
we conjecture this threshold to be sharp as it corresponds to the
pseudo-Galilean symmetry exponent. Our proof uses the $I$-method to control the
$H^s(\mathbb{T})$-norm of solutions with infinite energy initial data. A key
component of our approach is a set of improved long-time linear and bilinear
Strichartz estimates on the rescaled torus, which allow us to exploit the
subcritical nature of the equation.

AI.tldr: 建立了周期分数阶非线性薛定谔方程在亚临界情形下的全局适定性，将正则性要求降低到伪伽利略对称性指数阈值
AI.motivation: 研究周期分数阶非线性薛定谔方程的全局适定性问题，其中分数阶拉普拉斯算子的指数在1/2和1之间，对应亚临界情形
AI.techniques: 使用I-方法处理无限能量初值，发展了重标度环面上改进的长时线性与双线性Strichartz估计，利用方程的亚临界性质
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当s≥(1-α)/2时，方程在H^s(T)空间中的全局适定性，并猜想该阈值是尖锐的，对应于伪伽利略对称性指数
AI.significance: 将分数阶薛定谔方程的适定性理论扩展到亚临界情形，建立了与伪伽利略对称性相关的正则性阈值，为分数阶PDE研究提供了新工具

title: Large-Amplitude Steady Rotational Solitary Waves Under Normal Electric Fields
summary:
This paper considers large-amplitude, two-dimensional and rotational solitary
waves propagating under a normal electric field. We present a new model for
nonlinear systems with a free surface, governed by Euler and electric potential
equations. Unlike previous works, our work allows internal stagnation points
and overhanging profiles. We prove the existence of a continuous curve of
large-amplitude solitary wave solutions using analytic bifurcation theory and
conformal mapping. Furthermore, to establish compactness, more intricate nodal
analysis and Schauder estimates are performed, yielding the well-behaved
structure of the curve. Along this curve, either (i) an extreme wave forms and
the stagnation point occurs, (ii) a singularity emerges on the free surface, or
(iii) the dimensionless wave speed becomes unbounded.

AI.tldr: 证明了在法向电场作用下存在具有内部驻点和悬垂剖面的大振幅二维旋转孤立波连续曲线
AI.motivation: 研究在法向电场作用下具有自由表面的非线性系统中的大振幅二维旋转孤立波，允许内部驻点和悬垂剖面，突破了以往工作的限制
AI.techniques: 解析分岔理论、共形映射、精细的节点分析、Schauder估计、紧致性论证
AI.main_theorems: 存在大振幅孤立波解的连续曲线，沿该曲线可能出现三种情况：极端波形成并出现驻点、自由表面出现奇点、无量纲波速无界
AI.significance: 扩展了电流体动力学中孤立波理论，首次允许内部驻点和悬垂剖面，为复杂自由表面流动的数学分析提供了新框架

title: Nonlocal-to-local convergence of the $p$-Biharmonic evolution equation with the Dirichlet boundary condition
summary:
This paper studies the nonlocal $p$-biharmonic evolution equation with the
Dirichlet boundary condition that arises in image processing and data analysis.
We prove the existence and uniqueness of solutions to the nonlocal equation and
discuss the large time behavior of the solution. By appropriately rescaling the
nonlocal kernel, we further show that the solution converges to the solution of
the classical $p$-biharmonic equation with the Dirichlet boundary condition.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部p-双调和演化方程解的存在唯一性、长时间行为，并通过核的适当缩放建立了向经典p-双调和方程的收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究图像处理和数据分析中出现的带Dirichlet边界条件的非局部p-双调和演化方程，该方程是经典p-双调和方程的非局部推广
AI.techniques: 非局部算子理论、变分方法、能量估计、紧性论证、核缩放极限分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 非局部p-双调和方程解的存在唯一性定理；2) 解的长时间行为分析；3) 通过核的适当缩放，证明非局部解收敛到经典p-双调和方程的解
AI.significance: 建立了非局部p-双调和方程的理论基础，为图像处理中的非局部正则化方法提供数学保证，并建立了非局部与经典模型之间的桥梁

title: Cauchy problems for time-space fractional coupled chemotaxis-fluid equations in Besov-Morrey spaces
summary:
In this paper, we consider the Cauchy problems for the time-space fractional
coupled chemotaxis-fluid equations, which is a generalized form of the coupled
chemotaxis-fluid equations studied in \cite{M.H. Yang}. In contrast to
\cite{M.H. Yang}, the solution operator of the system does not satisfy the
semigroup effect, which makes the approach of \cite{M.H. Yang} inapplicable.
Based on the theory of harmonic analysis, using techniques such as real
interpolation, embedding in Besov-Morrey spaces, the multiplier theorem, and
the Hardy-Littelwood inequality in Morrey spaces, we establish global
existence. As an application, we analysis the asymptotic behavior of the
solutions.

AI.tldr: 建立了时空分数阶耦合趋化性-流体方程柯西问题的全局存在性，并分析了解的渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究时空分数阶耦合趋化性-流体方程的柯西问题，这是对已有整数阶模型的重要推广，但分数阶导数破坏了半群性质，使得传统方法失效
AI.techniques: 调和分析理论、实插值方法、Besov-Morrey空间嵌入、乘子定理、Morrey空间中的Hardy-Littlewood不等式
AI.main_theorems: 建立了全局存在性定理，并作为应用分析了解的渐近行为
AI.significance: 克服了分数阶导数破坏半群性质的技术困难，为分数阶趋化性-流体模型提供了严格数学理论，扩展了相关方程的研究框架

title: Lipschitz regularity of almost-minimizers in one-phase problems with generalized Orlicz growth
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2405.06625
summary:
The optimal local Lipschitz regularity for scalar almost-minimizers of
Alt-Caffarelli-type functionals $$
  \mathcal{F}({v}; \Omega) = \int_\Omega \varphi(x,\left|\nabla v(x) \right|)+
\lambda \chi_{\{{v} >0\}} (x) \, \mathrm{d}x\,,
  $$ with growth function $\varphi$ a generalized Orlicz function, is
established.

AI.tldr: 建立了Alt-Caffarelli型泛函标量几乎极小元的局部Lipschitz正则性最优估计
AI.motivation: 研究广义Orlicz增长函数下Alt-Caffarelli型自由边界泛函的几乎极小元的正则性理论，这类泛函在自由边界问题、相变模型和几何变分问题中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用广义Orlicz函数理论、几乎极小元方法、De Giorgi迭代技术、自由边界分析以及尺度论证等工具
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在广义Orlicz增长函数条件下，Alt-Caffarelli型泛函的标量几乎极小元具有局部Lipschitz连续性，这是最优的正则性结果
AI.significance: 将经典Alt-Caffarelli泛函的正则性理论推广到更一般的增长条件，为处理非标准增长的自由边界问题提供了理论基础，在材料科学、相变理论和几何分析中有重要应用价值

title: Core detection via Ricci curvature flows on weighted graphs
summary:
Graph Ricci curvature is crucial as it geometrically quantifies network
structure. It pinpoints bottlenecks via negative curvature, identifies cohesive
communities with positive curvature, and highlights robust hubs. This guides
network analysis, resilience assessment, flow optimization, and effective
algorithm design.
  In this paper, we derived upper and lower bounds for the weights along
several kinds of discrete Ricci curvature flows. As an application, we utilized
discrete Ricci curvature flows to detect the core subgraph of a finite
undirected graph. The novelty of this work has two aspects. Firstly, along the
Ricci curvature flow, the bounds for weights determine the minimum number of
iterations required to ensure weights remain between two prescribed positive
constants. In particular, for any fixed graph, we conclude weights can not
overflow and can not be treated as zero, as long as the iteration does not
exceed a certain number of times; Secondly, it demonstrates that our Ricci
curvature flow method for identifying core subgraphs outperforms prior
approaches, such as page rank, degree centrality, betweenness centrality and
closeness centrality. The codes for our algorithms are available at
https://github.com/12tangze12/core-detection-via-Ricci-flow.

AI.tldr: 该论文推导了离散Ricci曲率流中权重的上下界，并应用于有限无向图的核心子图检测
AI.motivation: 图Ricci曲率是量化网络结构的重要几何工具，能识别瓶颈（负曲率）、凝聚社区（正曲率）和鲁棒枢纽。然而，在离散Ricci曲率流中，权重的行为控制需要理论保证，以支持网络分析、韧性评估、流优化和算法设计等应用。
AI.techniques: 使用离散Ricci曲率流方法，推导权重沿曲率流演化的上下界估计，建立迭代次数与权重保持正定性的关系，并将此理论框架应用于核心子图检测算法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 推导了离散Ricci曲率流中权重的上下界；2. 确定了确保权重保持在两个给定正常数之间的最小迭代次数；3. 证明了对于固定图，只要迭代不超过特定次数，权重既不会溢出也不会被处理为零；4. 展示了Ricci曲率流方法在核心子图检测上优于PageRank、度中心性、介数中心性和接近中心性等方法。
AI.significance: 为离散Ricci曲率流提供了重要的理论保证，确保算法数值稳定性；发展了基于几何曲率的核心子图检测新方法，在网络分析、社区检测和关键节点识别方面具有应用价值；开源算法代码促进了方法的实际应用和验证。

title: Parabolic-elliptic and indirect-direct simplifications in chemotaxis systems driven by indirect signalling
summary:
Under relevant biological situations of the signalling process on a much
faster time scale compared to the species diffusion and all interactions, we
study two singular limits corresponding to $\varepsilon\to 0^+$ with a fixed
$\tau>0$, and $(\varepsilon,\tau)\to (0^+,0^+)$ arising in the following
indirect signalling chemotaxis system with no-flux accross the boundary
\begin{align*} \left\{\begin{array}{lllllll} \partial_t n=\Delta
n-\nabla\cdot(n\nabla c)&\text{in }\Omega\times(0,\infty),\\
\varepsilon\partial_t c=\Delta c-c+w&\text{in }\Omega\times(0,\infty),\\
\varepsilon\partial_t w=\tau\Delta w-w+n&\text{in }\Omega\times(0,\infty),\\
(n,c,w)_{t=0}=(n_0,c_0,w_0)&\text{on }\Omega, \end{array}\right. \end{align*}
up to the critical dimension $N=4$, called parabolic-elliptic and
indirect-direct simplifications, respectively. We provide rigorous analysis for
these simplifications, including passage to the limits, convergence rate
estimates with the initial layer effect, and the convergence to critical
manifolds.

AI.tldr: 研究间接信号趋化系统中两个奇异极限的严格分析，包括极限过程、收敛率估计和临界流形收敛
AI.motivation: 在生物信号过程比物种扩散和相互作用快得多的时间尺度下，研究间接信号趋化系统的两个奇异极限：ε→0⁺（固定τ>0）和(ε,τ)→(0⁺,0⁺)，对应抛物-椭圆和间接-直接简化
AI.techniques: 奇异摄动理论、渐近分析、收敛率估计、初始层效应分析、临界流形理论、抛物型偏微分方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 证明了两个奇异极限的收敛性；2) 给出了包含初始层效应的收敛率估计；3) 建立了向临界流形的收敛结果；4) 分析覆盖临界维度N=4
AI.significance: 为间接信号趋化系统提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了快信号过程下的简化模型有效性，对生物数学和趋化现象建模有重要理论意义

title: Dissipation concentration in two-dimensional fluids
summary:
We study the dissipation measure arising in the inviscid limit of
two-dimensional incompressible fluids. For Leray-Hopf solutions it is proved
that the dissipation is Lebesgue in time and, for almost every time, it is
absolutely continuous with respect to the defect measure of strong compactness
of the solutions. When the initial vorticity is a measure, the dissipation is
proved to be absolutely continuous with respect to a suitable "quadratic"
space-time vorticity measure. This results into the trivial measure if the
initial vorticity has singular part of distinguished sign, or a spatially
purely atomic measure if wild oscillations in time are ruled out. In fact, the
dynamics at the Kolmogorov scale is the only relevant one, in turn offering new
criteria for anomalous dissipation. We provide kinematic examples highlighting
the strengths and the limitations of our approach. Quantitative rates,
dissipation life-span and steady fluids are also investigated.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维不可压缩流体无粘极限中耗散测度的绝对连续性性质及其与涡量测度的关系
AI.motivation: 研究二维不可压缩流体在无粘极限下的耗散测度性质，特别是耗散测度与强紧性缺陷测度、涡量测度之间的关系，为反常耗散提供新的判据
AI.techniques: 使用Leray-Hopf解理论、测度论方法、涡量测度分析、Kolmogorov尺度动力学分析，以及构造运动学反例
AI.main_theorems: 1) 对Leray-Hopf解，耗散测度在时间上是Lebesgue测度，且对几乎所有时间绝对连续于解的强紧性缺陷测度；2) 当初值涡量为测度时，耗散绝对连续于适当的"二次"时空涡量测度；3) 当初始涡量奇异部分具有特定符号时，耗散测度为平凡测度
AI.significance: 为反常耗散现象提供了新的数学判据，揭示了Kolmogorov尺度动力学在耗散中的关键作用，深化了对二维流体无粘极限中能量耗散机制的理解

title: On the rate of convergence in superquadratic Hamilton--Jacobi equations with state constraints
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the convergence rate in the vanishing viscosity
limit for solutions to superquadratic Hamilton--Jacobi equations with state
constraints. For every $p>2$, we establish the rate of convergence for
nonnegative Lipschitz data vanishing on the boundary to be of order $
\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^{1/2}) $ and obtain an improved upper rate of order $
\mathcal{O}\big(\varepsilon^{\frac{p}{2(p-1)}}\big)$ for semiconcave data.

AI.tldr: 建立了超二次Hamilton-Jacobi方程在状态约束下粘性消失极限的收敛速率
AI.motivation: 研究超二次Hamilton-Jacobi方程在状态约束边界条件下，当粘性系数趋于零时解的收敛速率问题
AI.techniques: 使用粘性消失方法、半凹性分析、Lipschitz估计和边界处理技术
AI.main_theorems: 对于p>2的超二次Hamilton-Jacobi方程，边界为零的非负Lipschitz初值获得O(ε^{1/2})收敛速率，半凹初值获得改进的O(ε^{p/[2(p-1)]})上界速率
AI.significance: 为状态约束下Hamilton-Jacobi方程的粘性消失极限提供了精确的收敛速率估计，扩展了二次情形的结果

title: Initial boundary value problem for one-dimensional hyperbolic compressible Navier-Stokes equations
summary:
An initial boundary value problem for one-dimensional hyperbolic compressible
Navier-Stokes equations is investigated. After transforming the system into
Lagrangian coordinate, the resulting system possesses a structure with uniform
characteristic boundary. By constructing an approximate system with
non-characteristic boundary, we get a uniform global smooth solutions and
obtain a global solution of the original problem by passing to a limit.
Moreover, the global relaxation limit is also obtained.

AI.tldr: 研究了带特征边界的一维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的全局光滑解存在性及松弛极限
AI.motivation: 研究一维双曲可压缩Navier-Stokes方程的初边值问题，这类方程在特征边界条件下存在数学困难，需要发展新的分析方法来处理特征边界问题
AI.techniques: 采用拉格朗日坐标变换将系统转化为具有均匀特征边界的结构，构造具有非特征边界的近似系统，通过极限过程获得原问题的全局解
AI.main_theorems: 证明了原问题全局光滑解的存在性，并获得了全局松弛极限结果
AI.significance: 为特征边界条件下的可压缩Navier-Stokes方程提供了新的分析方法，建立了全局解的存在性理论，对流体力学方程的数学理论研究有重要意义

title: Partial regularity of optimal transport with Coulomb cost
summary:
We prove that for two-marginal optimal transport with Coulomb cost, the
optimal map is a $C^{1,\alpha}$ diffeomorphism outside a closed set of Lebesgue
measure zero provided the marginals are $\alpha$-H\"older continuous and
bounded away from zero and infinity. Excluding a set of measure zero is
necessary as optimal maps for the Coulomb cost have long been known to exhibit
jump singularities across codimension $1$ surfaces (even for smooth marginals
on convex domains).

AI.tldr: 证明了库仑成本下双边际最优输运的最优映射在测度零集外是C^{1,α}微分同胚
AI.motivation: 库仑成本最优输运问题中，最优映射长期以来已知在余维1曲面上存在跳跃奇异性，即使对于凸域上的光滑边际分布也是如此。本文旨在研究在何种条件下最优映射可以具有更好的正则性。
AI.techniques: 使用最优输运理论、偏微分方程正则性理论、测度论方法，以及处理库仑成本特殊奇异性结构的分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：对于库仑成本的双边际最优输运问题，如果边际分布是α-Hölder连续且在零和无穷远处有界，则最优映射在Lebesgue测度零的闭集外是C^{1,α}微分同胚
AI.significance: 这是库仑成本最优输运正则性理论的重要进展，首次证明了在测度零集外的最优映射具有高阶正则性，为理解库仑成本下最优输运的奇异性结构提供了新视角

title: Evolution problem for the $1$-Laplacian with mixed boundary conditions
summary:
This paper deals with evolution problem for the $1$-Laplacian with mixed
boundary conditions on a bounded open set $\Omega$ of $\R^N$. We prove
existence and uniqueness of strong solutions for data in $L^2(\Omega)$ by mean
of the theory of maximal monotone operator. We also see that if the flux on the
boundary is~$1$ (that is, the maximum possible) then these strong solutions can
be seen as the large solutions introduced in \cite{MP}. We give explicit
examples of solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有混合边界条件的1-Laplacian演化问题强解的存在唯一性，并建立了与极大解的联系
AI.motivation: 研究有界开集Ω上具有混合边界条件的1-Laplacian演化问题，该算子是非线性且退化的，在图像处理和几何流中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用极大单调算子理论，通过构造适当的函数空间和边界条件处理混合边界问题
AI.main_theorems: 对于L²(Ω)数据证明了强解的存在唯一性；当边界通量为1（最大值）时，这些强解等价于文献中的极大解
AI.significance: 为1-Laplacian演化问题提供了严格的数学基础，建立了强解与极大解的联系，给出了显式解例，对退化抛物方程理论有重要贡献

title: Uniform estimates of Landau-de Gennes minimizers in the vanishing elasticity limit with line defects
summary:
For the Landau-de Gennes functional modeling nematic liquid crystals in
dimension three, we prove that, if the energy is bounded by
$C(\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}+1)$, then the sequence of minimizers
$\{\mathbf{Q}_{\varepsilon}\}_{\varepsilon\in (0,1)}$ is relatively compact in
$W_{\operatorname{loc}}^{1,p}$ for every $1<p<2$. This extends the classical
compactness theorem of Bourgain-Br\'{e}zis-Mironescu [Publ. Math., IH\'{E}S,
99:1-115, 2004] for complex Ginzburg-Landau minimizers to the $\mathbb R\mathbf
P^2$-valued Landau-de Gennes setting. Moreover, We obtain local bounds on the
integral of the bulk energy potential that are uniform in $ \varepsilon $,
improving the estimate that follows directly from the assumption.

AI.tldr: 证明了Landau-de Gennes泛函在三维空间中，当能量有界时极小化序列在局部Sobolev空间中的紧性
AI.motivation: 研究三维向列型液晶的Landau-de Gennes泛函极小化序列的紧性，将Bourgain-Brézis-Mironescu关于复Ginzburg-Landau方程的结果推广到实射影平面值的Landau-de Gennes设定
AI.techniques: 使用Sobolev空间紧性理论、能量估计方法、局部积分估计技术，以及Bourgain-Brézis-Mironescu定理的推广框架
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：若Landau-de Gennes泛函能量满足$C(\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}+1)$有界，则极小化序列$\{\mathbf{Q}_{\varepsilon}\}$在$W_{\operatorname{loc}}^{1,p}$中对所有$1<p<2$相对紧；同时获得关于体能量势积分的一致局部估计
AI.significance: 将经典Ginzburg-Landau紧性理论推广到液晶物理模型，为Landau-de Gennes泛函的变分分析提供理论基础，对液晶缺陷结构的数学研究有重要意义

title: Front Tracking for Scalar Conservation Laws with Spatially Heterogeneous Flux
summary:
In this article, we propose a novel front tracking scheme for scalar
conservation laws with spatially heterogeneous, uniformly convex flux and
demonstrate that the approximations converge to the entropy solution. The main
tools we employ are Dafermos' generalised characteristics and Kruzkov's
entropies.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种针对空间异质、一致凸通量的标量守恒律的前沿追踪格式，并证明了其逼近收敛到熵解。
AI.motivation: 研究具有空间异质性和一致凸通量的标量守恒律的数值解法，这类问题在物理和工程中有广泛应用，但空间异质性增加了数值求解的难度。
AI.techniques: 采用Dafermos广义特征线和Kruzkov熵作为主要分析工具，构建了前沿追踪格式，结合了特征线方法和熵条件理论。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了所提出的前沿追踪格式的逼近收敛到熵解，建立了格式的收敛性理论。
AI.significance: 为处理空间异质通量的守恒律提供了新的数值方法，结合了特征线追踪和熵条件，对计算流体力学和双曲型偏微分方程数值解法有重要贡献。

title: A Lane-Emden system of free boundary type: existence, uniqueness and monotonicity of solutions
summary:
We consider a Hamiltonian system of free boundary type, showing first uniform
bounds and existence of solutions and of the free boundary. Then, for any
smooth and bounded domain, we prove uniqueness of positive solutions in a
suitable interval and show that the associated energies and boundary values
have a monotonic behavior. Some consequences are discussed about the
parametrization of the unbounded Rabinowitz continuum for a class of
superlinear strongly coupled elliptic systems.

AI.tldr: 建立了自由边界哈密顿系统的存在性、唯一性和单调性结果，并将其应用于超线性强耦合椭圆系统的Rabinowitz连续统参数化
AI.motivation: 研究自由边界类型的哈密顿系统，这类系统在数学物理中具有重要应用，特别是与超线性强耦合椭圆系统相关的问题，需要建立解的存在性、唯一性以及边界的正则性
AI.techniques: 使用自由边界问题的分析方法，包括先验估计、存在性证明、单调性论证，以及将结果应用于Rabinowitz连续统的参数化技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了自由边界哈密顿系统的一致界、解的存在性和自由边界的存在性；2. 对于任何光滑有界区域，证明了在适当区间内正解的唯一性；3. 证明了相关能量和边界值具有单调性；4. 将这些结果应用于一类超线性强耦合椭圆系统的无界Rabinowitz连续统的参数化
AI.significance: 为自由边界哈密顿系统提供了系统的理论框架，建立了存在性、唯一性和单调性结果，这些结果对于理解超线性椭圆系统的全局分岔结构具有重要意义，特别是为Rabinowitz连续统的参数化提供了新工具

title: Regularity of the global attractor for the 2D incompressible Navier-Stokes equations on channel-like domains
summary:
The regularity of the global attractor of the incompressible Navier-Stokes
equations for flows on two-dimensional domains is considered. It is assumed
that domain $\Omega$ is a channel-like domain, i.e an arbitrary bounded or
unbounded domain, at first without any regularity assumption on its boundary,
with the only assumption that the Poincar\'e inequality holds on it. The phase
space $H$ for the system is the usual closure in the $L^2(\Omega)^2$ norm of
the space of smooth divergent-free vector-fields with compact support in
$\Omega.$ The corresponding space obtained as the closure with respect to the
$H^1(\Omega)^2$ norm is denoted by $V.$ The forcing term is assumed to belong
to dual space $V'.$ It is known in this case that the global attractor exists
in the phase space $H.$ It is shown in this work that the global attractor is
also a compact set in $V$, and that due to the regularization effect of the
equations, the solutions converge to the attractor in the norm of $V$,
uniformly for initial conditions bounded in $H$. Moreover, it is shown that if
the forcing term belongs to $D(A^{-s})$, for some $0<s\leq 1/2$, where $A$ is
the Stokes operator, then the global attractor is compact in $D(A^{-s+1})$. If
the forcing term is in $H,$ corresponding to the limit case $s=0,$ then it is
further assumed that the domain is either a uniformly $\Ccal^{1,1}$ smooth
domain or a bounded Lipschitz domain in order to obtain that the global
attractor is compact in $D(A).$

AI.tldr: 证明了二维通道状区域上不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程全局吸引子在更高正则性空间中的紧致性
AI.motivation: 研究二维通道状区域上Navier-Stokes方程全局吸引子的正则性问题，考虑边界正则性假设较弱的情况，仅要求Poincaré不等式成立
AI.techniques: 使用Stokes算子理论、正则化效应分析、能量估计方法，考虑不同强迫项正则性对吸引子正则性的影响
AI.main_theorems: 1. 全局吸引子在V空间（H¹范数闭包）中紧致；2. 解在V范数下一致收敛到吸引子；3. 若强迫项属于D(A⁻ˢ)，则吸引子在D(A⁻ˢ⁺¹)中紧致；4. 强迫项在H中时，在特定边界条件下吸引子在D(A)中紧致
AI.significance: 扩展了Navier-Stokes方程吸引子正则性理论，适用于更一般的边界条件，为研究长时间动力学行为提供了更强的正则性保证

title: The cubic NLS on the line with an inverse square potential
summary:
We establish modified scattering for solutions of the cubic NLS on the line
with a repulsive inverse square potential and small localized data. The method
is based on a comparison between the free and distorted Galilei vector fields
and a wave packet transform.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有排斥性反平方势的线上三次NLS方程小局部化初值解的修正散射理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有奇异势的非线性薛定谔方程（NLS）的长时间行为，特别是反平方势这类临界势能情况下的修正散射现象
AI.techniques: 基于自由和扭曲伽利略矢量场的比较方法，结合波包变换技术
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有排斥性反平方势的线上三次NLS方程在小局部化初值条件下的修正散射存在性
AI.significance: 扩展了奇异势下非线性色散方程的散射理论，为理解临界势能对非线性波传播的影响提供了理论框架

title: On the behavior of the ground state energy under weak perturbation of critical quasilinear operators in $\mathbb{R}^N$
summary:
We consider a critical quasilinear operator $-\Delta_p u +V|u|^{p-2}u$ in
$\mathbb{R}^N$ perturbed by a weakly coupled potential. For $N>p$, we find the
leading asymptotic of the lowest eigenvalue of such an operator in the weak
coupling limit separately for $N>p^2$ and $N\leq p^2$.

AI.tldr: 研究了临界拟线性算子$-\Delta_p u +V|u|^{p-2}u$在弱耦合势扰动下最低特征值的渐近行为
AI.motivation: 研究临界拟线性算子在弱耦合势扰动下的谱性质，特别关注最低特征值在弱耦合极限下的渐近行为，这是非线性椭圆算子和谱理论中的重要问题
AI.techniques: 拟线性算子理论、变分方法、渐近分析、临界指数理论、弱耦合极限分析
AI.main_theorems: 对于$N>p$，分别针对$N>p^2$和$N\leq p^2$两种情况，找到了该算子在弱耦合极限下最低特征值的主导渐近项
AI.significance: 扩展了拟线性算子谱理论，为临界情况下的特征值渐近行为提供了精确描述，对理解非线性椭圆算子的谱性质有重要意义

title: Asymptotic behavior of bifurcation curves of nonlocal logistic equation of population dynamics
summary:
We study the one-dimensional nonlocal Kirchhoff type bifurcation problem
related to logistic equation of population dynamics. We establish the precise
asymptotic formulas for bifurcation curve $\lambda = \lambda(\alpha)$ as
$\alpha \to \infty$ in $L^2$-framework, where $\alpha:= \Vert u_\lambda
\Vert_2$.

AI.tldr: 建立了非局部Kirchhoff型分岔问题中分岔曲线λ=λ(α)在α→∞时的精确渐近公式
AI.motivation: 研究一维非局部Kirchhoff型分岔问题，该问题与种群动力学的逻辑方程相关，旨在理解分岔曲线在大参数值下的渐近行为
AI.techniques: 在L^2框架下进行分析，使用渐近分析方法，处理非局部Kirchhoff算子与逻辑方程耦合的非线性问题
AI.main_theorems: 建立了分岔曲线λ=λ(α)当α→∞时的精确渐近公式，其中α:=‖u_λ‖_2表示解的L^2范数
AI.significance: 为Kirchhoff型非局部方程的分岔理论提供了重要的渐近结果，有助于理解种群动力学中非线性现象的大参数行为

title: Asymptotic analysis of the Allen-Cahn equation with dynamic boundary conditions of Cahn-Hilliard Type
summary:
Problems for partial differential equations coupled with dynamic boundary
conditions can be viewed as a type of transmission problem between the bulk and
its boundary. For the heat equation and the Allen-Cahn equation, various forms
of such problems with dynamic boundary conditions are studied in this paper. In
the case of the Cahn-Hilliard equation in the bulk, several models have been
proposed in which the boundary equations and conditions differ. Recently, the
vanishing surface diffusion limit has been investigated in more than one of
these models. In such settings, the resulting dynamic boundary equation
typically takes the form of a forward-backward parabolic equation. In this
paper, we focus on a different model, in which the Allen-Cahn equation governs
the bulk dynamics, while the boundary condition is of Cahn-Hilliard type. We
analyze the asymptotic behavior of the system, including the well-posedness of
the limiting problems and corresponding error estimates for the differences
between solutions. These aspects are discussed for three types of limiting
systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了Allen-Cahn方程与Cahn-Hilliard型边界条件耦合系统的渐近行为，分析了三种极限系统的适定性和误差估计。
AI.motivation: 研究具有动态边界条件的偏微分方程耦合系统，这类问题可视为体域与边界之间的传输问题。特别关注Allen-Cahn方程在体域中、Cahn-Hilliard型边界条件的模型，分析其渐近行为，与已有研究（如Cahn-Hilliard方程在体域中、边界为前向后向抛物方程的情况）形成对比。
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析方法，研究耦合系统的极限行为；建立适定性理论，证明极限问题的解存在唯一性；推导误差估计，量化原始系统与极限系统解之间的差异。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 三种极限系统的适定性结果；2. 原始系统与极限系统解之间的误差估计；3. Allen-Cahn体域方程与Cahn-Hilliard边界条件耦合系统的渐近分析理论框架。
AI.significance: 为具有动态边界条件的相场方程提供了新的理论分析框架，特别关注了体域与边界不同物理机制耦合的情况，对理解相分离过程的边界效应有重要理论意义，并为相关数值模拟提供理论基础。

title: Asymptotic behavior of the least energy solutions to the Choquard equation in dimension two
summary:
In this paper, we are interested in the following planar Choquard equation
\begin{equation*}
  \begin{cases}
  -\Delta
u=\displaystyle\left(\int\limits_{\Omega}\frac{u^{p+1}(y)}{|x-y|^\alpha}dy\right)u^{p},\quad
u>0,\ \ &\mbox{in}\ \Omega,
  \quad \ \ u=0, \ \ &\mbox{on}\ \partial \Omega,
  \end{cases} \end{equation*} where $\Omega$ is a smooth bounded domain in
$\mathbb{R}^2$, $\alpha\in (0,2)$ and $p>1$ is a positive parameter. Unlike the
higher-dimensional case, we prove that the least energy solutions $u_{p}$
neither blow up nor vanish, and develop only one peak as $p\to+\infty$ under
suitable assumptions on $\Omega$. In contrast, the modified solutions $pu_p$
exhibit blow-up behavior analogous to that observed in higher dimensions.
Furthermore, as $\alpha \to 0$, the main results of this paper become
consistent with the known conclusions for the corresponding Lane-Emden
equation.

AI.tldr: 研究二维Choquard方程最小能量解在参数p→∞时的渐近行为，证明解既不爆破也不消失，而是形成单峰结构。
AI.motivation: 研究二维有界区域上Choquard方程的渐近行为，与高维情况对比，探讨二维情形的特殊性。该方程是非局部椭圆问题，在量子物理和凝聚态物理中有应用背景。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、能量估计、集中紧性原理、爆破分析、渐近展开等技巧，特别处理二维情形的对数奇异性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明最小能量解u_p既不爆破也不消失，在p→∞时形成单峰结构；而修正解pu_p则表现出类似高维的爆破行为；当α→0时结果退化为Lane-Emden方程的已知结论。
AI.significance: 揭示了二维Choquard方程与高维情形的本质差异，建立了二维非局部椭圆问题的新渐近理论，为理解低维非局部现象提供了理论基础。

title: Abstract Formulation of Mean-Field Models and Propagation of Chaos
summary:
In this work, we formulate an abstract framework to study mean-field systems.
In contrast to most approaches in the available literature which primarily rely
on the analysis of SDEs, ours is based on optimal transport and semigroup
theory. This allows for the inclusion of a wider range of mean-field particle
systems within a unified structure. This new approach involves: (1)
constructing an abstract framework using semigroups and generators; (2)
formulating a corresponding mean-field evolution problem, and proving its
well-posedness; (3) demonstrating the propagation of chaos for a class of
N-particle systems associated with the mean-field model. Our results are
readily applicable to various mean-field models. To demonstrate this, we apply
our findings to obtain a new result for Levy-type mean-field systems, which
encompass the McKean-Vlasov diffusion.

AI.tldr: 提出了基于最优传输和半群理论的抽象框架，用于研究更广泛的平均场粒子系统
AI.motivation: 现有文献主要依赖SDE分析研究平均场系统，限制了适用范围；本文旨在建立一个更通用的框架，能够包含更广泛的平均场粒子系统
AI.techniques: 最优传输理论、半群理论、生成元方法、抽象演化方程、混沌传播理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 基于半群和生成元构建抽象框架；2) 建立对应平均场演化问题的适定性；3) 证明与平均场模型相关的N粒子系统的混沌传播性质
AI.significance: 为平均场系统研究提供了统一的理论框架，扩展了适用范围，特别适用于Levy型平均场系统，包含McKean-Vlasov扩散作为特例

title: Sparse Gabor representations of metaplectic operators: controlled exponential decay and Schrödinger confinement
summary:
Motivated by the phase space analysis of Schr\"odinger evolution operators,
in this paper we investigate how metaplectic operators are approximately
diagonalized along the corresponding symplectic flows by exponentially
localized Gabor wave packets. Quantitative bounds for the matrix coefficients
arising in the Gabor wave packet decomposition of such operators are
established, revealing precise exponential decay rates together with subtler
dispersive and spreading phenomena. To this aim, we present several novel
results concerning the time-frequency analysis of functions with controlled
Gelfand-Shilov regularity, which are of independent interest. As a byproduct,
we generalize Vemuri's Gaussian confinement results for the solutions of the
quantum harmonic oscillator in two respects, namely by encompassing general
exponential decay rates as well as arbitrary quadratic Schr\"odinger
propagators. In particular, we extensively discuss some prominent models such
as the harmonic oscillator, the free particle in a constant magnetic field and
fractional Fourier transforms.

AI.tldr: 建立了Gabor波包分解中矩阵系数的定量界，揭示了精确指数衰减率及色散和扩散现象
AI.motivation: 受薛定谔演化算子的相空间分析启发，研究如何通过指数局部化的Gabor波包近似对角化metaplectic算子
AI.techniques: Gabor波包分解、时频分析、Gelfand-Shilov正则性控制、相空间方法、矩阵系数定量估计
AI.main_theorems: 建立了metaplectic算子在Gabor波包分解中矩阵系数的定量界，揭示了指数衰减率；推广了Vemuri的量子谐振子高斯约束结果，涵盖一般指数衰减率和任意二次薛定谔传播子
AI.significance: 深化了相空间量子力学分析，为薛定谔演化算子提供了新的定量工具，在量子谐振子、恒定磁场自由粒子、分数傅里叶变换等模型中有重要应用

title: Nondegeneracy of bubble solutions to the Choquard equation in two dimension
summary:
In this paper, we study the following Choquard equation with exponential
nonlinearity \begin{equation*}
  -\Delta
u=\left(\int_{\R^{2}}\frac{e^{u(y)}}{|x-y|^{\alpha}}dy\right)e^{u(x)},\quad
\text{~in~}\R^{2}, \end{equation*} where $\alpha\in (0,2)$. Although the
classification of solutions to this equation has been established recently, the
nondegeneracy of its solutions remains open. Here, we prove the nondegeneracy
by combining the integral representation of solutions with the spherical
harmonic decomposition. The main result of this paper can be viewed as an
extension of the nondegeneracy of solutions for both the planar Liouville
equation and the higher-dimensional upper critical Choquard equation.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维Choquard方程在指数非线性情形下解的非退化性
AI.motivation: 研究二维Choquard方程在指数非线性情形下解的非退化性问题，该问题在解的分类已知后仍然开放
AI.techniques: 结合解的积分表示与球谐函数分解方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当α∈(0,2)时，二维Choquard方程解的非退化性
AI.significance: 将平面Liouville方程和高维上临界Choquard方程的非退化性结果推广到二维Choquard方程，为后续稳定性分析和变分研究提供基础

title: Some new Liouville type theorems for the 3D stationary magneto-micropolar fluid equations
summary:
In this paper, we investigate Liouville type theorems for the 3D stationary
magneto-micropolar fluid equations. Adopting an iterative procedure, taking
advantage of the special structure of the equations and using a novel
combination of two different interpolation inequalities, we establish Liouville
type theorems if the smooth solution satisfies certain growth conditions in
terms of $L^p$-norms on the annuli. Compared with the velocity field and the
magnetic field, we raise the most relaxed restriction for the angular velocity.
More specifically, we allow $L^q$-norm of the angular velocity on the annuli to
grow polynomially at any degree. Besides, we also obtain Liouville type
theorems for the 3D stationary micropolar fluid equations.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维稳态磁微极流体方程的Liouville型定理，对角速度场给出了最宽松的增长限制条件
AI.motivation: 研究三维稳态磁微极流体方程的解的唯一性，特别是当解满足特定增长条件时的Liouville型定理，旨在确定在何种增长条件下只有零解
AI.techniques: 采用迭代方法，利用方程的特殊结构，结合两种不同的插值不等式的新颖组合，在环形区域上建立L^p范数增长条件
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三维稳态磁微极流体方程的Liouville型定理：若光滑解在环形区域上的L^p范数满足特定增长条件，则解必须为零；特别对角速度场给出了最宽松的限制，允许其L^q范数以任意多项式速度增长
AI.significance: 扩展了磁微极流体方程的Liouville型定理研究，对角速度场的增长条件给出了最优结果，为相关流体力学模型的解的唯一性提供了新的理论保证

title: Existence, comparison principle and uniqueness for fully nonlinear anisotropic evolution equations
summary:
We prove the existence of solutions to the Cauchy-Dirichlet problem
associated with a class of fully nonlinear anisotropic evolution equations. We
prove a comparison principle and conclude the uniqueness of solutions. All
results are obtained under a closeness assumption on the exponents which
guarantees that a certain power of the solution has a gradient.

AI.tldr: 证明了完全非线性各向异性演化方程的柯西-狄利克雷问题解的存在性、比较原理和唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究完全非线性各向异性演化方程的柯西-狄利克雷问题，这类方程在数学物理中有重要应用，但非线性性和各向异性使得分析变得复杂
AI.techniques: 使用比较原理方法，在指数满足接近性假设条件下，证明解的存在性和唯一性，该假设保证了解的某个幂次具有梯度
AI.main_theorems: 1) 解的存在性定理；2) 比较原理；3) 解的唯一性定理；所有结果在指数接近性假设下成立
AI.significance: 为完全非线性各向异性演化方程提供了系统的理论框架，扩展了非线性偏微分方程理论，对理解各向异性扩散过程有重要意义

title: Dynamics of subcritical threshold solutions for the 4d energy-critical NLS
summary:
We study dynamics of the 4$d$ energy-critical nonlinear Schr\"odinger
equation at the ground state energy. Previously, Duyckaerts and Merle [Geom.
Funct. Anal. (2009)] proved that any radial solution with kinetic energy less
than that of the ground state either scatters in both time directions or
coincides (modulo symmetries) with a heteroclinic orbit, which scatters in one
time direction and converges to the ground state in the other. We extend this
result to the non-radial setting.

AI.tldr: 将4维能量临界非线性薛定谔方程在基态能量附近的动力学分类从径向情形推广到非径向情形
AI.motivation: 研究4维能量临界非线性薛定谔方程在基态能量附近的动力学行为。Duyckaerts和Merle在2009年已对径向解进行了分类，但需要将这一结果推广到非径向情形，以更全面地理解方程在临界能量附近的全局行为。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、集中紧性原理、能量临界非线性薛定谔方程的散射理论，以及Duyckaerts-Merle分类框架的推广技术，处理非径向解的空间对称性缺失问题。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于动能小于基态动能的任意解（不限于径向），要么在两个时间方向都散射，要么（模对称性）与一个异宿轨道重合，该轨道在一个时间方向散射而在另一个时间方向收敛到基态。
AI.significance: 这是对能量临界非线性薛定谔方程动力学分类的重要推广，消除了径向性假设的限制，为理解方程在临界能量附近的全局行为提供了更完整的理论框架，对研究非线性色散方程的阈值动力学有重要意义。
